feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: my data action has no error , but it is not working ,
entry.content:
I want to update my buying price column or br product with 100 but  data action is not working


CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY = [d/Br_profit_center], [d/BR_Product], [d/BR_COMPONENT]
CONFIG.TIME_HIERARCHY = CALENDARYEAR
CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = ON
CONFIG.FLIPPING_SIGN_ACCORDING_ACCTYPE = OFF
MEMBERSET [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center], %profit_center%)  //MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %BUDGET_YR% TO NEXT(11, "MONTH", %BUDGET_YR%)
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/start_date] TO [d/Version].[p/end_date]
MEMBERSET [d/gl_account1] = ("CIF LKR", "CIF_LKR")
MEMBERSET [d/BR_brand] = "#"
//MEMBERSET [d/BR_COMPONENT] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_OFFICE] = "#"
 
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_customer] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_Dist_Channel] = "#"
//MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET[d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD"
 
 
 
IF [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center].[h/heirarchy], "0PHAH") THEN
//IF [d/BR_Product].[p/] = "Imported Product" THEN
        DELETE()
 
DATA([d/gl_account1] = "Buying Price", [d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD" ) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account1] = "FOB" ) * ( 1 + (RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account1] = "INSURANCE %")/100) + (RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account1] ="FREIGHT")/100))
 
 
DATA([d/BR_Product] = "3000000368") = 1000
 
ENDIF

i tried this one also 
CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY = [d/Br_profit_center], [d/BR_Product]
CONFIG.TIME_HIERARCHY = CALENDARYEAR
CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = ON
CONFIG.FLIPPING_SIGN_ACCORDING_ACCTYPE = OFF
MEMBERSET [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center], "0PHAH")   //MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %BUDGET_YR% TO NEXT(11, "MONTH", %BUDGET_YR%)
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/start_date] TO [d/Version].[p/end_date]
MEMBERSET [d/gl_account1] = ("CIF LKR", "CIF_LKR")
MEMBERSET [d/BR_brand] = "#" //MEMBERSET [d/BR_COMPONENT] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_OFFICE] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_customer] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_Dist_Channel] = "#" //MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET[d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD"
//MEMBERSET[d/BR_COMPONENT] = "#"
 
 
 
IF [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center].[h/heirarchy], "0PHAH") THEN
 
IF [d/BR_Product].[p/import_mnfr] = "Imported Product" THEN
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
DELETE()
 
 
 
/
 
DATA([d/gl_account1] = "Buying Price", [d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD" ) = 100
 
 
 
//DATA([d/gl_account1] = "Buying Price",[d/BR_Product] = "3000000368") = 1000*1
ENDIF
ENDIF

entry.title: It is possible to uncheck by default show groups feature in Data Analyzer?
entry.content:
Hello,

Whenever I will open Data Analyzer from script NavigationUtils.openDataAnalyzer(...); by default dimensions are grouped in the list. It is possible to have that by default unchecked? Without need to uncheck that manually and have flat presentation.

entry.title: Datasphere & SAC Users and Activities Source Tables
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to create usage reports (Activities related to which views from Datasphere are accessed by SAC and the user that viewed the story in SAC and last login date for individual users for both Datasphere and SAC) based on the Users and Activities tables found in Datasphere and SAC under the Security Tab.

 

I would like to avoid having to download the CSVs from the User and Activities tabs completely and rather use the underlying tables where this data is stored directly.

Where can I find the source tables? Using the Database Explorer on Datasphere I have looked under the SYS and DWC_Global schemas so far with no luck.

entry.title: How to Add Calculated Measures from Two Different Models in SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m working on a SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Story, and I have the following requirement:

I have two calculated measures, each coming from a different analytical model (1  From Datasphere and other third Party Tools), and I’d like to create a new calculated measure by adding them together to use in a chart or KPI in the story.

Example:

  • From Model A, I have a calculated measure: Online Sales Revenue

  • From Model B, I have another calculated measure: Retail Store Sales Revenue

I want to create a new measure like:

Total Sales Revenue = Online Sales Revenue + Retail Store Sales Revenue

and use this total in a Combined KPI tile or chart within the same story.

How can we  Achieve this in SAC Story .

entry.title: Hardcoding users in transformation logic of IPS to provide access for SAC Reporting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We need to hardcode users in IPS to grant access to Story Reports. Earlier, we were using the sf.user.filter in the properties and added the respective usernames there. But there are more than 100 users now to be hardcoded and we cannot continue to add in this filter because of the character limit.

Can anybody give an idea if this hardcoding for providing access to SAC reporting can be done via transformation logic of source/target system?

What code can be added to hardcode such users?

Thanks in advance for your response.

entry.title: SAC embed mode not working on mobile devices
entry.content:
Hi all,

We tried to integrate sac content (stories etc) via iframe in our Fiori System. It works in the browsers on laptops but not on mobile devices. The issue: because the fiori url is different from the iframe url (sapanalyticscloud….) . Because of this the Story will not open on iOS devices (for example).I figured That this is because of the Setting „Prevent Cross Site Tracking“. I think this is also because we have idp in between and using saml for auth. Anyone having the same issue? Unfortunately sap do not offering proxy urls so you could have sac in your own url area.

Ideally we would like to keep fiori as our single point of entry for our users…

entry.title: SAP BDC Demo Environment
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Since the BDC trial version is now available, I’d like to create a demo using it. Could you please guide me on how to enable or build the content? Also, is it possible to showcase a demo using standard content, considering that the source systems are not properly maintained? I’m looking for any way to effectively pitch it to clients. I’m exploring options to work exclusively within BDC AI/ML part. The practice source systems are not properly maintained, making it impractical to establish connections with them. However, intelligent applications or insight apps require both source and target systems to be connected in order to enable the content. Are there any materials or documents available that can guide the implementation of Databricks AI/ML on raw data within an SAP BDC environment?

entry.title: SAC Error During Package Export
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I'm encountering an issue while exporting a package in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). The error message I receive is:

Object 'ModelName' failed to export: mPlanId2QueryId[sId] is not iterable (cannot read property undefined)

Has anyone experienced this before or knows what might be causing it?
From what I understand, it seems related to a missing or undefined mapping between plan IDs and query IDs, but the model appears to be correctly configured, and I haven’t made recent changes.
Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance,
Flavia

entry.title: SAC - Difference between formulas using RESTRICT, LOOKUP, RESULTLOOKUP?
entry.content:
Hello folks:

Please, can someone explain the differences, best with a vivid example, beetnw the formulas

RESTRICTED, LOOKUP, RESULTLOOKUP

when defining a calculated measure in an SAC model?

 

Thanks in advance,
Andreas J.A.

entry.title: SAPSAC : can we have % values and absolute values together in above chart
entry.content: can we have % values and absolute values together in Pie/ Donut chart

entry.title: Validation Check for Driver % Summing to 100% by Cost Center in SAC Table via Script
entry.content:
Hi All,

I’m working on a planning scenario in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) and need help implementing a validation check on a table.

The table contains driver values that are expected to sum up to 100%, but the key requirement is that this summation must be validated with respect to each cost center, even when the table includes multiple combinations of other dimensions.

Currently, I’ve enabled the "Totals" row in the table, which allows for visual verification, but this doesn’t serve as an actual validation. What I’m looking for is:

A way to check programmatically or through scripting if the driver percentages sum to 100% for each cost center

If the sum is not 100% for any cost center, a popup message or alert should display, identifying which cost centers are affected

     Budget
     2024
     Driver
CostcenterCountryChannelBrandProduct 
CC1Totals   1
CC1#2##0.15
CC1#3##0.75
CC1#4##0.1

Is there any way to achieve this through scripting (e.g., in an analytic application) or through any other built-in SAC functionality?

Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Calculate Date difference excluding weekends in SAC using data actions?
entry.content:
Hello,

In the planning scenario, the fiscal period ranges from Apr to Mar. I wanted to calculate no of days between the start date and user defined date excluding the weekends in SAC. The result of this calculation will be further used in other calculation and that is the reason I want to use data action to store these values.

For ex: Start Date: 01 Apr 2025 , User Defined Date: 26 May 2025. The result should be 40 days excluding Saturdays and Sundays between these time ranges.

My question to this community is whether this is possible in SAC? If it is possible, those who have faced this similar issue and knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Data Action - Place Dimension = # on the valid combination from booked data
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a uploaded data via a csv file on FUNC_AREA = "#" and PLANT = "#" on an upload version. The rest of the dimensions is placed on the correct members.

I need to transfer these numbers to an budget version, however it should post on the valid combination of the booked values of the uploaded values on dimensions on "#"

I have already transfered last years booked values ( thus on the correct combinations of dimension members).

CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY = [d/FUNC_AREA],[d/COST_CENTER],[d/PROFIT],[d/Plant],[d/GL_ACCOUNT]
// Scope
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/From_Date] TO [d/Version].[p/To_Date]
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = ("Amount_LC")

// Copy
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version] = %SourceVersion%) > 0 then 
	FOREACH.BOOKED [d/FUNC_AREA], [d/Plant]
		DATA () = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]= %SourceVersion%, [d/FUNC_AREA] = "#", [d/Plant] = "#")
	ENDFOR
ENDIF

It works with if I use the FOREACH statement without the IF statement, however the performance is too bad, as there are many members.

I tried with the IF statement to only loop over the uploaded members of ([d/FUNC_AREA],[d/COST_CENTER],[d/PROFIT],[d/Plant],[d/GL_ACCOUNT]) but 0 values is returned.

 

Anyone has any ideas?

entry.title: SAC Import scheduled jobs didn't start at all in a single day schedule
entry.content:
Hello everyone

in a model A, I set up an import job to retrieve information from a sql query.

I scheduled it, as I have done many times, once a day late night, together with other models B, C, D etc : these other models were scheduled before model A.

Normally it works everything fine, but only for a single day, I have seen from the history logs, that this model A didn't start, but B,C,D started fine.

I expected to see some error in the import job history log or something else, but nothing was written about  model A that day.

The next day, the schedule import job worked fine as usual.

Why could it happen? Is there a way to see some advanced logs to understand why this schedule simply was skipped?

Thank you so much for your help

Adriano

entry.title: Chart_1.getDataSource().getDimensionFilters() not returning any values
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I got a heat map chart. Attached to chart is an input control for dimension profitcenter - multiple values.
Input control is only for that heatmap.

I need to determine if a filter is set on the profitcenter dimension (before executing another script).

I planned to use getDimensionFilters() with following code

var value = Chart_16.getDataSource().getDimensionFilters("Profitcenter")[0];

switch (value.type) {
    case FilterValueType.Single:
        var singleValue = cast(Type.SingleFilterValue, value);
        console.log(singleValue.value); // can access the 'value' property now
        break;
    case FilterValueType.Multiple:
        var multipleValue = cast(Type.MultipleFilterValue, value);
        console.log(multipleValue.values); // can access the 'values' property now
        break;
    case FilterValueType.Range:
        var rangeValue = cast(Type.RangeFilterValue, value);
        console.log(rangeValue.from); // can access the 'from' property now
        console.log(rangeValue.to);   // can access the 'to' property now
        // further range properties: 'less', 'lessOrEqual', 'greater', 'greaterOrEqual'
        break;
    default:
        break;
}

However, the array is always empty. No matter if dimension filter via the input control is set or not.

Is this function not working for charts? Or is there a general problem when the dimension is filtered via input control?

Thanks for all insights in advance!

Best regards
Axel

entry.title: Concat two dimension properties and pass it to booked dimension values (Script)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have some booked values stamped on [d/func_area] = # and the correct [d/gl_account] and [d/cost_center].

I can derive the actual functional area by concatting two properties from [d/gl_account] and [d/cost_center].

My question is, if it is possible by scripting to stamp the data on the correct [d/func_area]?

Best regards

entry.title: Every time I try to multiply two different accounts in a data actions, the results is zero
entry.content:
Hi! I am trying to create various Data Action Steps where the goal ist to calculate Account-values in the future based on Drivers which are being typed in by the user. Since I do have a hierarchy, and the calculations are often done on a parent node, I need to somehow say how to break down the values to its leafs. My Idea was: 

Data() = RESULTLOOKUP(Leaf) / RESULTLOOKUP(Parent) * (RESULTLOOKUP(Driver1) * 11100 )+ RESULTLOOKUP(Driver2) * RESULTLOOKUP(Driver3))

where RESULTLOOKUP(Leaf) / RESULTLOOKUP(Parent) basically tells how much weight of the total the current leaf has. 

Unfortunately everytime I multiply the weight with one of the Drivers, the values are displayed as "0". 

Can someone help me please?  

SAP Analytics Cloud #Planning #DataAction#

entry.title: Get filter values when right clicking on table
entry.content:
Hello,

In my optimized story in SAC, I have a table with only one dimension (which is a hierarchy) and few measures.

Through the script, I didn't manage to get the value of node on which i am filtering by right clicking on it and then click on filter member.

I try to use getDimensionFilters() but it returns nothing.

If you click first on the line before filtering it, you can get the value with getSelections() but i am tryong to anticipate if a user do not click on the line before filtering. 

Do you have a solution about this issue ?
Thank you in advance

Best Regards

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Smart Insights show nothing
entry.content:
Hi expert, I currently use SAC but the feature Smart Insight show me nothing. My another model work perfectly but in this model it show nothing. Is there any rule for building a model to use Smart Insight?

Thank you and have a nice day.

entry.title: SAC - group accounts in AccountLookup ( parent - child )
entry.content:
In a planning model,I have parent child GL hierarchy, 

Unlike other models, I can't use restrict because the GL dimension is not selectable in the formula.

I need to combine different accounts with different parents to create a measure. how can I achieve this? 

accountlookup allows selecting a single parent or a single account,
